zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Radcliffe於1420年出生在英國藍卡爾薩爾福德時，他的父親Alexander Radcliffe19歲，母親Agnes Harington13歲。他於大約1443年與Jane Trafford在英國藍卡爾薩爾福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1498年5月15日在英國藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾享年78歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾薩爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Radcliffe于1420年出生在英国藍卡爾薩爾福德时，他的父亲Alexander Radcliffe19岁，母亲Agnes Harington13岁。他于大约1443年与Jane Trafford在英国藍卡爾薩爾福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1498年5月15日在英国藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾享年78岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾薩爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Radcliffe was born in 1420, in Salford, Lancashire, England, his father, Alexander Radcliffe, was 19 and his mother, Agnes Harington, was 13. He married Jane Trafford about 1443, in Salford, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 15 May 1498, in Ordsall, Lancashire, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Salford, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Radcliffe est né en 1420, à Salford, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Alexander Radcliffe, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Agnes Harington, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Jane Trafford environ 1443, à Salford, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 15 mai 1498, à Ordsall, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Salford, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Radcliffe 1420 in Salford, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Radcliffe 19 und seine Mutter Agnes Harington 13. Er hat um 1443 in Salford, Lancashire, England Jane Trafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Mai 1498 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Ordsall, Lancashire, England und wurde in Salford, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Radcliffe è nato il nel 1420 nel Salford, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Alexander Radcliffe, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Harington, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Jane Trafford circa 1443, nel Salford, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 15 maggio 1498, nel Ordsall, Lancashire, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Salford, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Radcliffeが1420年にイギリスランカシュアイアサルフォードで生まれた時，父Alexander Radcliffeは19歳，母Agnes Haringtonは13歳であった。約1443年にイギリスランカシュアイアサルフォードでJane Traffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1498年5月15日にイギリスランカシュアイアオルドサルで78歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアサルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Radcliffe(이)가 1420년 영국 랭카실르 살퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Radcliffe(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Harington(은)는 13세였다. 그는 대략 1443년 영국 랭카실르 살퍼드에서 Jane Trafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1498년 5월 15일 영국 랭카실르 르드사에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 살퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Radcliffe nasceu em 1420, em Salford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alexander Radcliffe, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Harington, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Trafford aproximadamente 1443, em Salford, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de maio de 1498, em Ordsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Salford, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Radcliffe родился в 1420 г. в местности салфорд, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Alexander Radcliffe было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Harington, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Trafford около 1443 г. в местности салфорд, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 15 мая 1498 г. в местности ордсалл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности салфорд, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Radcliffe nació en 1420, en Salford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alexander Radcliffe, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Agnes Harington, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Jane Trafford aproximadamente 1443, en Salford, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1498, en Ordsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Salford, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
